name: generated-harness-readonly-context

tools.name: search_past_decisions
tools.description: Search canonical local harness decision and context files for a query.

tools.name: get_capability_status
tools.description: Return generated harness capability registry contents.

tools.description: Return open questions from ACTIVE_SNAPSHOT.md and related handoff files.

canonical_memory_rule: MCP output is advisory until summarized into internal harness records.
